name: anclas-port-pipeline
description: アンクラスPort データパイプライン: q-league / anclas.jp を正規化JSON化

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test test/qleague-parser.test.ts test/standings.test.ts test/player-parser.test.ts test/goalnote-parser.test.ts
scripts.generate: npm run generate:matches && npm run generate:players || echo 'players generation failed (non-fatal)'
